overview: Siddhartha Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET), located in Ibrahimpatnam, Hyderabad, Telangana, is an autonomous engineering institution established in 2008. Operated under the G.P. Educational Society, the college has grown into a well-regarded destination for technical education in the region. Widely recognized by its EAMCET code 'SIEI', the institute balances technical expertise with human values, providing smart infrastructure, updated academic curriculums, and strong industry-aligned engineering and management programs designed to make graduates completely workplace-ready.
accreditation: Autonomous Institution; Approved by AICTE; Affiliated to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). Accredited by NAAC and certified under Times Engineering Survey rankings.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Core & Allied Specializations (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, ECE)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹71,250 per year. Total course tuition fee is approximately ₹2,85,000.

placements.totalOffers: 450+ job offers across active engineering batches
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Wipro, Amazon, Cognizant, Accenture, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Genpact, FoxGeek
placements.internshipHighlights: High alignment with real industry projects through software, AI/ML, and Cybersecurity internships.

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are strictly governed via the Convener quota through State Counseling (TS EAPCET/ICET) and through direct Management B-Category procedures.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions systematically align with the annual TS EAPCET engineering and JNTUH centralized academic scheduling.

campus.specialNote: Bus transportation facilities are optional and require an additional annual fee of approximately ₹30,000.

contact.address: Siddhartha Institute of Engineering & Technology, Vinobanagar, Ibrahimpatnam, Ranga Reddy District, Hyderabad, Telangana – 501506, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Tuition fee concessions available for top merit students and core engineering stream candidates.
scholarships.fullWaiver: 100% tuition fee reimbursement structural benefits for highly ranked TS EAPCET convener allocations.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Special institutional allowances and options for Minor degrees in AIML & Data Science for eligible core branches.
scholarships.governmentAid: Full eligibility for Telangana state post-matric scholarship schemes via the TS ePASS framework for reservation and economically backward segments.
